docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $490.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT LABRIE, NICHOLE A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LABRIE, NICHOLE A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LABRIE, NICHOLE A. $490.00 PRINCIPAL, $51.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $541.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
